home.heroTitle: Color, ground for the modern painter.
home.heroSubtitle: Sinours crafts finely milled watercolor pigments and mediums for artists who care about lightfastness, transparency, and the feel of a brush on paper.
home.storyBody: Every Sinours color is milled from carefully selected pigment powders and bound by hand. We measure what matters — lightfastness, transparency, particle regularity, coverage — and publish the numbers on every product.
home.categoriesTitle: Three ways to find your color.
home.pigmentsDesc: Single-pigment watercolors across nine color families.
home.mediumsDesc: Repair and auxiliary mediums that change how paint behaves.
home.setsDesc: Curated watercolor and medium sets for every practice.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Browse the full Sinours collection. No purchase here — find an authorized agent to order.

product.findAgentToOrder: This product is available through authorized Sinours agents.

about.title: About Sinours
about.subtitle: A watercolor house built on pigment science and a love of the craft.
about.companyBody: Sinours is a watercolor manufacturer dedicated to the materials of painting. We mill our own pigment powders, formulate our own binders and mediums, and publish the technical data behind every color we make. Our work serves studio artists, illustrators, and educators who want predictable, archival results.

pigment.title: Pigment first
pigment.body: We name and index every pigment we use. No mystery blends, no shortcuts.

data.title: Published data
data.body: Lightfastness, transparency, particle regularity and coverage are printed on every product page.

archive.title: Built to last
archive.body: Tested for lightfastness so a painting made today reads the same in a hundred years.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach the Sinours team or find an agent near you.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks — your message has been received. We'll reply shortly.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

agents.title: Find an Agent
agents.subtitle: Sinours is sold through a network of authorized agents. Reach one directly to order or ask about availability.
agents.becomeAgentBody: Interested in representing Sinours in your region? We're growing our network. Get in touch and we'll start the conversation.

footer.tagline: Color, ground for the modern painter.
